name: Sour Cream Marinade for Chicken
recipeInstructions:
This delicious marinade makes enough for 3 lbs chicken parts.
1. In a bowl, blend together salad dressing mix, water, and lemon juice.
2. Add sour cream and combine thoroughly.
3. Slowly add salad oil, whipping until creamy.
4. Marinate chicken pieces for about 2 hours.
5. Bake in moderate oven until tender.
